title: Accounts Executive
description:
Company Overview

PIONEERS & LEADERS (PUBLISHERS) PTE LTD is a leading media industry establishment since 1977, delivering print and digital media solutions。

Job Summary

You will manage comprehensive accounting functions to ensure accurate financial reporting and compliance, supporting business growth through timely and precise financial data management.

Responsibilities

  • Manage full sets of accounts up to the balance sheet to ensure accurate financial records
  • Prepare bank reconciliations to verify cash balances and identify discrepancies
  • Compile monthly management accounts to provide actionable financial insights for decision-making
  • Execute quarterly GST reporting to maintain compliance with tax regulations
  • Process monthly payroll accurately to ensure timely employee compensation
  • Ensure statutory compliance and submit timely reports to government bodies and statutory boards
  • Collaborate effectively with external auditors and tax agents to facilitate audits and tax filings
  • Perform additional accounting and administrative duties as assigned to support business operations

Required competencies and certifications

  • Proficient in using Xero and QuickBooks accounting software to manage financial transactions and reporting
  • Able to communicate effectively in Mandarin to liaise with various stakeholders
  • Possess LCCI Intermediate Accounting certification or higher to demonstrate accounting knowledge

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Ability to multitask efficiently in a dynamic work environment to meet deadlines and manage multiple responsibilities

Other Information

  • Work schedule: 5 days work week

postedCompany.description:
PIONEERS & LEADERS (PUBLISHERS) PTE LTD

We are a leading establishment in the media industry, providing solutions to customers, as well as doing regular in-house publications since 1977. In line with new media, the company has also established itself in not just print media, but digital media (iPhone, websites, videos, etc).

Winner of the SME500 award since 2004 and an ISO 9001:2008 certified publishing house, we are looking for dynamic, self-motivated and hands-on personnel to join our family as for our business in Singapore and in the region.

Some of the policies set up to help our staff include:

  • Medical check-up leave
  • Reimbursements for medical fees
  • Study/Exam leaves
  • Flexible-work hour schemes
